indicators.name: White sinks
indicators.rationale: The white sinks provide a clean and neutral surface for yoga mats.

indicators.name: Brown wooden tiles
indicators.rationale: The brown wooden tiles might be slippery when wet, which could be a safety hazard during yoga.

indicators.name: Large mirror
indicators.rationale: The large mirror can help users align their poses and monitor their progress.

indicators.name: Toilet
indicators.rationale: The presence of a toilet in the same room as the sinks and mirrors can be distracting and uncomfortable for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga due to the presence of a toilet and potentially slippery wooden tiles, but it has positive features like white sinks and a large mirror.
